data.name: 與不登校妹妹一起的30天
data.detailed_description:
身為一名自由插畫師，原本平靜又有點無聊的日子，因為愛翹課的妹妹突然跑來躲進你的公寓而變得熱鬧起來——她居然打算賴在這裡不走了。

這個小丫頭，個性有些憂鬱，話也很少。你選擇不多問她的理由，而是決定暫時讓她留下，好好照顧她。畢竟……或許這是一個難得的機會，讓你能慢慢走進她的世界，融化她那層冷冷的外殼。

當個貼心的好哥哥吧，說不定有一天，她會願意對你敞開心扉呢。

變成一個好哥哥，照顧妹妹的同時，還得平衡你作為自由插畫師的工作。合理安排時間，既能陪她度過時光，也能完成委託的插畫作品。

完成插畫工作賺來的錢，你可以買些參考書，或者添置一些讓生活更舒適的小物件，讓你們的同居生活變得更加輕鬆愉快。

妹妹是個有些消沉的女孩，需要你更多的關心與陪伴。教她學習、為她煮飯、誇誇她或者摸摸她的頭。隨著你花更多時間陪她，她也會漸漸打開心扉。

預計遊玩時間：2–4 小時

輕鬆上手的模擬遊戲

在工作和陪伴妹妹之間合理安排時間。你可以和她聊天、教她學習，甚至給她一些鼓勵。不過，別忘了完成你的插畫委託，賺取報酬來購買物品，提升你和妹妹的生活品質。

三種難度選擇

選擇適合自己的難度：簡單、普通或困難。難度越高，你就需要更加小心地管理時間，同時遊戲和妹妹也會對任何錯誤更加寬容。

美麗的黑白視覺

體驗彷彿進入漫畫世界的感覺，精美的手繪黑白畫面定會帶來難忘的體驗。

data.short_description: 愛逃學的妹妹突然跑來賴在你的公寓，生活瞬間多了幾分熱鬧。試著陪伴她，拉近你們的關係，同時別忘了繼續追逐你作為插畫家的夢想。你可以為她摸摸頭，為她做一頓飯，與她聊天……慢慢地，或許她會願意為你敞開心扉呢。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Living with my Little Sister
data.detailed_description:
Your peaceful and boring daily life as a freelance illustrator is suddenly turned upside down when your truant little sister decided to crash in your apartment to skip school.

She's a downer and the silent type. So, you decided to let her stay and take care of her for the time being instead of prying any further. And besides... this might be your chance to finally break through that cold exterior and get closer to her.

Be a good brother, and take care of your sister, all while balancing your job as a freelance illustrator. Manage your time wisely as you spend your time with her and work on the illustrations you were commissioned for.

Finish different commissions and receive money to buy several reference books and some QoL improvements for your room to make your cohabitation life with your sister even better.

Your little sister is a downer girl who needs your attention and care. Teach her how to study, cook for her, give her praise or head pats, and she will open up to you as you spend more time with her.

Playtime: 2-4 hours

Easy-to-Understand Simulation Game

Manage your time wisely between your job and spending time with your little sister. You can talk with her, teach her how to study, and even give her some encouragement. However, don't forget to do your commissions for your job so you can buy things and increase both your and your sister's quality of life.

Three Different Difficulties

Choose your preferred difficulty between easy, normal, and hard. The higher the difficulty, the more careful you will have to be with how you manage your time, and the less forgiving both the game and your sister are for any mistakes.

Beautiful Monochrome Graphics

Experience what it would be like to step right into the pages of a manga with stunning black-and-white hand drawn graphics that are sure to be an unforgettable experience.

data.short_description: Your truant younger sister decided to crash at your place. Improve your relationship by spending time with her while balancing your job as an illustrator. Give her a head pat, cook for her, have a chat, and maybe, over time, she'll open up to you.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
